column2: BodyFat4 %>% .[,-c(1:13)] %>% pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("PC"), names_to = "prcomp", values_to = "value") %>% ggplot(aes(x = reorder(prcomp, value, sd), y = value, fill = Body_Fat_Level)) + geom_boxplot() + labs(x = "Principal Components", title = "Contributions of Principal Componets in Explaining Variance") +
